ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the retailer offering the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_retailer_id FOREIGN KEY ("retailer_id") REFERENCES retailers ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_body" TEXT /* Body of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who submitted the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of not helpful votes the review has received */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "moderation_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the moderator regarding the review */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the review if it has been edited */,
  "previous_review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous version of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_previous_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., PRICE, QUALITY) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the topic information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_topics" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic associated with the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id", "topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer information was last updated */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer is subscribed to the company's newsletter or updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "retailers" (
  "retailer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each retailer */,
  "retailer_name" TEXT /* Name of the retailer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the retailer */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the retailer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the retailer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retailer was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the retailer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("retailer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_roles" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role was assigned to the customer */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "role_id")
)
